question: What two distinct abilities does a Xylotian 'Chrono-Weaver' possess?

answers.original:
A Xylotian Chrono-Weaver can perceive echoes of past events and create temporal distortions.

### References

- [1] Xylotian Chrono-Weaver

entities.name: Xylotian Chrono-Weaver
entities.description: Xylotian Chrono-Weavers are individuals trained to perceive echoes of past events and create temporal distortions.

entities.name: Temporal Flux
entities.description: Temporal Flux is the ambient energy source that powers a Chrono-Weaver's abilities.

entities.name: Temporal College
entities.description: The Temporal College is an institution on Xylos where Chrono-Weavers train and hone their skills.

entities.name: Xylotian Myths
entities.description: Xylotian myths involve legendary Chrono-Weavers who could allegedly halt time.

relations.description: Xylotian myths feature legendary Chrono-Weavers, influencing the perception of their abilities.
Chrono-Weavers perceive time in a multi-linear fashion, aligning with the Xylotian concept of time.
Chrono-Weavers draw their abilities from ambient Temporal Flux.
Chrono-Weavers train at the Temporal College to hone their skills.
Xylotian cuisine features Sun-Berries, which ripen instantly, reflecting the temporal abilities of Chrono-Weavers.
Chrono-Weavers wear amulets made of Hourglass Sandstone to keep time.
